title: Contact | Sir Jeremy Wright MP
meta_description: Latest news and campaigns from Jeremy Wright, Conservative MP for Kenilworth and Southam in Warwickshire.
headings: h3: Sir Jeremy Wright MP Kenilworth and Southam
text_excerpt: Contact | Sir Jeremy Wright MP Skip to main content Main navigation Home About Jeremy News In Parliament HS2 Campaign Responses Contact Contact Leave this field blank Constituency Office Jubilee House, Smalley Place, Kenilworth, CV8 1QG 01926 853650 [email protected] Westminster Office House of Commons, London SW1A 0AA 020 7219 2008 [email protected] Jeremy Wright MP Jeremy Wright MP The quickest way to get in touch with me is to send a message by completing the form below. It is also helpful if you provide a contact telephone number. First Name Last Name Postcode Address id Address 1 Email Mobile number Message I would like to be kept up-to-date by Jeremy Wright on future issues that matter to me: Yes There will be an easy way to opt out of future messages. For more information on how we handle your data and your rights, please see our Privacy Policy . Volunteer for us In which of these ways can you help us? Delivering a few leaflets locally now and again Helping with office and admin tasks Making calls to voters and volunteers Joining our canvassing team to knock on doors Potentially standing to be a local Conservative Councillor Becoming a Digital Ambassador By agreeing to volunteer for us, you also agree to us contacting you about volunteering. For more information, please see our Data Protection and Privacy Policy Due to a strict parliamentary protocol I am only able to help those who live in the Kenilworth and Southam constituency, I am not able to intervene in matters raised by the constituents of another constituency. The information you provide is used in accordance with our Data Protection and Privacy Policy . By clicking this button you agree to your information being used in accordance with that policy.
